zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Sittingbourne Kent Osbyrn於1370年出生在英國肯特希廷波恩時，他的父親Sir Marion Osbyrne31歲，母親Juliana Marion29歲。他於1390年之前與Lady Joan Algor在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1422年在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國肯特希廷波恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Sittingbourne Kent Osbyrn于1370年出生在英国肯特希廷波恩时，他的父亲Sir Marion Osbyrne31岁，母亲Juliana Marion29岁。他于1390年之前与Lady Joan Algor在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1422年在他的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在英国肯特希廷波恩。

nameMeanings.name: Osbyrn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Osborne
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Osbern, partly from late Old English Ōsbern, an Anglicized form of Old Norse Ásbiǫrn (from áss ‘god’ + biǫrn ‘bear’), but more usually from Norman use of the cognate ancient Germanic Ōsbern. Osbern was often treated as an alternative form of Osbert. For pet forms see Hoskin and Opie . The surname has also been established in Ireland (Waterford, Tipperary) since the mid 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Kent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from the English county. This is probably named with a Celtic word meaning ‘border’. Use as a given name is of recent origin, but it is now quite popular. It may in part be seen as a short form of   Kenton .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Sittingbourne Kent Osbyrn was born in 1370, in Sittingbourne, Kent, England, his father, Sir Marion Osbyrne, was 31 and his mother, Juliana Marion, was 29. He married Lady Joan Algor before 1390, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1422, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Sittingbourne, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Sittingbourne Kent Osbyrn est né en 1370, à Sittingbourne, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Marion Osbyrne, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Juliana Marion, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joan Algor avant 1390, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1422, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Sittingbourne, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Sittingbourne Kent Osbyrn 1370 in Sittingbourne, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Marion Osbyrne 31 und seine Mutter Juliana Marion 29. Er hat vor 1390 in Lancashire, England Lady Joan Algor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1422 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Sittingbourne, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Sittingbourne Kent Osbyrn è nato il nel 1370 nel Sittingbourne, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir Marion Osbyrne, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Juliana Marion, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joan Algor prima del 1390, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1422, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Sittingbourne, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Sittingbourne Kent Osbyrnが1370年にイギリスケントシッティングボウルンで生まれた時，父Sir Marion Osbyrneは31歳，母Juliana Marionは29歳であった。1390年以前にイギリスランカシュアイアでLady Joan Algorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1422年に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリスケントシッティングボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Sittingbourne Kent Osbyrn(이)가 1370년 영국 켄트 짓틴그보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Marion Osbyrne(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana Marion(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1390년 이전 영국 랭카실르에서 Lady Joan Algor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1422년 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 짓틴그보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Sittingbourne Kent Osbyrn nasceu em 1370, em Sittingbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Marion Osbyrne, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Juliana Marion, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joan Algor antes 1390, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1422, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Sittingbourne, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Sittingbourne Kent Osbyrn родился в 1370 г. в местности ситтингбурн, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Marion Osbyrne было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Juliana Marion, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan Algor перед 1390 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1422 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности ситтингбурн, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Sittingbourne Kent Osbyrn nació en 1370, en Sittingbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Marion Osbyrne, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Juliana Marion, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lady Joan Algor antes de 1390, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1422, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Sittingbourne, Kent, Inglaterra.
